creator: Google

evidence.locator: raw/ch18.html, Recovery Logistics and Recovery Timeline
evidence.text: At Google, the teams that perform recovery are the teams that build and run the systems day to day. These individuals include SREs, developers, system administrators, helpdesk personnel, and relevant security specialists that manage routine processes like code audits and configuration reviews. Typically, by the time you spin up a recovery operation, the investigation team has begun a postmortem document (perhaps in the form of preliminary raw notes), which the recovery team updates as they proceed.

organizational_mechanism: Google's operating teams maintain and update postmortem documents during recovery.
